site.title: Hammad Media — TikTok Shop Affiliate Marketing for Supplement Brands
site.description: TikTok Shop affiliate marketing for supplements & wellness brands. $2.79M+ GMV and 105M+ product views in 2026 YTD — one operator, two accounts. Send me your product and I turn it into sales.
site.statsUpdated: June 8, 2026 (YTD: Jan 1 – Jun 8, 2026, both accounts combined)

hero.headline: I turn supplements into bestsellers.
hero.subheadline: Two TikTok Shop accounts, $2.79M+ in attributed GMV this year — every video scripted, filmed, and posted by me. 105M+ product views in 2026, and 113K+ units sold to show for it.

accounts.blurb: $1.89M GMV · 75,860 units · 68.5M product views in 2026 YTD. The volume engine — high-frequency review formats that drive roughly two-thirds of my GMV.
$901K GMV · 37,198 units · 37.3M product views in 2026 YTD. The second bite — products that win on one account get re-run here with fresh hooks. One sample, two shots at the For You page.

steps.title: Send me your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are my specialty — it's where my audience already buys.

steps.title: I create the content
steps.text: I make every review video myself — built around what actually converts on TikTok Shop: hooks, demos, and honest takes. No handoffs, no junior editors, no agency layers.

steps.title: You watch GMV climb
steps.text: Content goes live across my accounts, and every attributed sale is verified in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center — not my slides. Full transparency.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three engagement models. Every one keeps me invested in your sales — pick the level of priority your launch deserves.

tiers.name: Boosted Commission
tiers.text: Set an elevated, exclusive commission rate and your product enters my content rotation. You pay only on attributed sales — and the higher the rate, the higher your priority in the queue.

tiers.name: Retainer + Commission
tiers.text: A monthly retainer guarantees review videos and posting cadence across both accounts — plus commission on every sale. Predictable output, fully aligned incentives.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per category. I never promote your competitors — your products own the niche across every account I run. Retainer + commission + performance bonuses.

partnership.note: Every engagement is performance-aligned — I earn the most when your product sells. But one operator means hard limits: I onboard at most four new products a month, and when a month fills, the next slot goes to the best category fit. If you sell supplements or wellness, you're at the front of the line.

contact.heading: Work with me
contact.subheading: Tell me about your product — your TikTok Shop link, category, and the commission you have in mind. I reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours, and the person who replies is the person who makes your videos.

items.q: How fast is the first video?
items.a: Once your sample arrives and the commission is set, the first video is typically live within 7–10 days. Retainer partners get a guaranteed monthly cadence.
You do — one unit to my studio address, shared after we connect. No bulk inventory, no warehousing, no purchase orders.
It depends on price point and margin. Most products I take on run 20–35% on TikTok Shop — and elevated, exclusive rates get priority in my content rotation.
I read your talking points, but the video is mine — honest, native to my audience, and built to convert. Scripted ads don't sell on TikTok Shop; that's exactly why my numbers look the way they do.

On performance deals you've risked one sample. I test hooks and re-cut — some products take three videos to find the angle. And if a product truly doesn't fit my audience, I'll tell you straight instead of burning your time.

legal.disclaimer: Brand names and product images appear solely to document affiliate sales history and do not imply sponsorship or endorsement. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
legal.privacy: Privacy: inquiries submitted through this form are delivered to my inbox and used only to respond to you. This site sets no cookies and runs no trackers. Your information is never sold or added to a marketing list.

receipts.sub: Six products. $1.1M in attributed sales. Five months. Every number verifiable in your TikTok Shop Seller Center.
